task_completion.description: Verify the target URL is entered into Screaming Frog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'https://books.toscrape.com/' entered into the main URL input bar at the top of the Screaming Frog SEO Spider interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the exclude regex pattern is configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Exclude' configuration dialog (usually accessed via Configuration > Exclude) showing the regex pattern '.*/category/.*' added to the list.

task_completion.description: Verify the crawl limit is set to 50 URLs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Spider Configuration' dialog (Limits tab) showing 'Limit Crawl Total' or 'Max URLs' checked and the value set to exactly 50.

task_completion.description: Verify the crawl was executed and successfully filtered category pages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the main Screaming Frog window showing populated crawl results. The 'Address' column should show URLs from books.toscrape.com containing '/catalogue/' (product pages), but there should be NO URLs containing '/category/'.

task_completion.description: Verify the internal HTML results are exported as a CSV to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog, file manager, or terminal confirming a CSV file was saved to the '~/Documents/SEO/exports/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Screaming Frog SEO Spider application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Screaming Frog GUI must be visible in the screenshots. The agent should not bypass the UI by writing a custom Python scraping script.

integrity.description: Verify the crawl results appear genuine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Screaming Frog interface should show realistic crawl data (Status Codes like 200, Content Types like text/html, varying sizes) rather than a manually mocked or empty list.

integrity.description: Verify the CSV was exported by the application, not manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should use the 'Export' button in Screaming Frog, rather than opening a text editor and manually typing out URLs to fake the export.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://books.toscrape.com/. Exclude pattern: '.*/category/.*'. Max URLs: 50. Product pages on this site contain '/catalogue/' but NOT '/category/'. Category pages contain '/category/'. A successful crawl will show product pages (e.g., /catalogue/book-title_1/index.html) but completely exclude category listing pages. The final export must contain at least 5 product URLs and a maximum of 50 total URLs.
